config.//: Snapshot existing data, then tail the change stream — full copy + CDC in one lifecycle.
config.//pipeline: Restrict the change stream to the databases being migrated.
config.//topics: SAME topic.prefix across ALL 10 sources so same db.coll from every
config.//topics2: cluster lands on ONE topic (cdc.<db>.<coll>) => collections MERGE.
config.//key: Emit the document _id as the message key => per-_id ordering & partitioning.
config.//resume: Unique offset partition per source + heartbeats keep the resume token
config.//resume2: advancing on quiet collections so restarts never fall off the oplog.
config.offset.partition.name: src-cluster01
config.mongo.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: dlq.source.cluster01
